blocks.text: Match preview: Jabalpur Royal Lions face Bhopal Leopards in 29th Match (T20) on Mon, 15 Jun, 2026, 7:30 pm at Holkar Stadium Indore. Full pitch report, weather forecast, and squad details below.

rows: Jabalpur Royal Lions vs Bhopal Leopards

blocks.text: Standard T20 surface expected. Conditions will be clearer at the toss — monitor team selection and dew factor for night games.
Expected par score: 160–180 runs par score.
Light drizzle · High 36°C / Low 26°C · Rain: 0.5 mm · Wind: up to 18 km/h. Light rain possible — overcast conditions could assist swing bowling early.
International playing XI is announced at the toss. Check back on match day for confirmed line-ups.
